# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 662. Motorcycle Operator Training & Safety
##### § 662.010 — Nonapplicability of Certain Other Law

Chapter 1001 (Driver and Traffic Safety Education) , Education Code, does not apply to training offered or conducted under this chapter.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 595 (S.B.616), Sec. 8.010, eff. September 1, 2020.*

subsections.text: Chapter 1001 (Driver and Traffic Safety Education) , Education Code, does not apply to training offered or conducted under this chapter.
